name: npcink/npcink-abilities-toolkit
description: Standalone WordPress Abilities API package toolkit for agent-callable abilities, with optional Npcink AI integration.

scripts.eval:gutenberg-recipe:judge: command -v promptfoo >/dev/null || { echo "Install promptfoo first: npm install -g promptfoo"; exit 1; }; GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_OUTPUT="${GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_OUTPUT:-tests/gutenberg-recipe-eval/generated/promptfoo-judge-primary.json}"; GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_GRADER="${GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_GRADER:-openai:gpt-4.1-mini}"; rm -f "$GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_OUTPUT"; promptfoo eval -c tests/gutenberg-recipe-eval/promptfoo-judge.yaml --grader "$GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_GRADER" --output "$GUTENBERG_RECIPE_JUDGE_OUTPUT" --no-table
eval:gutenberg-recipe:judge:eval-lab: bash -c 'set -e; php tests/gutenberg-recipe-eval/export-default-suite.php "$@"; php tests/gutenberg-recipe-eval/export-promptfoo-judge-cases.php "$@"; TOOLKIT_ROOT="$(pwd)"; sh scripts/eval-lab.sh eval:gutenberg:judge:cross "input=$TOOLKIT_ROOT/tests/gutenberg-recipe-eval/generated/promptfoo-judge-cases.csv" "$@"' --
